title: Even more dimensions
description: A mod that adds more dimensions
body:
(Untill I update this a better documentation is available here [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/even-more-dimensions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/even-more-dimensions))

All portals are shaped like nether portals

There are 12 dimensions

The fartherlands, to make the portal, place one piece of smooth stone in the middle of the crafting table and above it place a flint and steel. Then make a portal with smooth stone





The fartherlands has an ore called farther ore. Farther ore creates stronger armor and tools





The Sky dimension, to make the portal, place one piece of glass in the middle of the crafting table and above it place a flint and steel. Then make a portal with glass











The sky dimension has an ore called sky ore. Farther ore creates even stronger armor and tools



The overworld echo, to make the portal, place one piece of dirt in the middle of the crafting table and above it place a flint and steel. Then make a portal with dirt












The lava dimension, to make the portal, place one piece of cobblestone in the middle of the crafting table and above it place a flint and steel. Then make a portal with cobblestone

The lava dimension is like the overworld, but there is no lava, only water









The void dimension, to make the portal, place one piece of stone (You smelt cobblestone to get it) in the middle of the crafting table and above it place a flint and steel. Then make a portal with stone









The sandbox dimension, to make the portal, place one piece of packed sand in the middle of the crafting table and above it place a flint and steel. Then make a portal with packed sand

To create packed sand, put 4 pieces of sand in the crafting table











The snow dimension, to make the portal, place one piece of snow in the middle of the crafting table and above it place a flint and steel. Then make a portal with packed sand





The mining dimension, to make the portal, place one piece of granite in the middle of the crafting table and above it place a flint and steel. Then make a portal with granite (now granite has a use lol)











The mining dimension is designed for mining there is only stone and ores. More ores spawn in the mining dimension





The war dimension, to make the portal, place one piece of andesite in the middle of the crafting table and above it place a flint and steel. Then make a portal with andesite (now andesite has a use too lol)

The war dimension has more things you can craft like pistols









The pistol, to craft it place a stick in the bottom middle slot in a crafting table, then a piece of metal (You can find it in the war dimension) in the left middle slot in the crafting grid and another in the middle

The pistols ammo, to get it place a piece of metal in the middle of a crafting table, you will get 30 bullets









The nether echo, to make the portal, place one piece of netherrack in the middle of the crafting table and above it place a flint and steel. Then make a portal with netherrack







The end echo, to make the portal, place one piece of end stone in the middle of the crafting table and above it place a flint and steel. Then make a portal with end stone







The jungle dimension, to make the portal, place one piece of jungle planks in the middle of the crafting table and above it place a flint and steel. Then make a portal with jungle planks











https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=134
